cards.title: Agentic Experiences
cards.description: Agentic experiences are systems and interfaces that empower users to leverage AI to accomplish their goals.

cards.title: Builder
cards.description: Declaratively build and visualize applications and business processes.

cards.title: Conversation Design
cards.description: The Salesforce Conversation Design Guidelines reflect the standardized approach in designing inclusive conversational experiences across the Salesforce ecosystem.

cards.title: Data Entry
cards.description: Salesforce users need to add, change, and delete information frequently. A wide variety of text entry and selection options clearly and efficiently facilitates this experience.

cards.title: Data Visualization
cards.description: Charts illustrate—and give us insight into—complex data relationships.

cards.title: Displaying Data
cards.description: Lists and feeds help users navigate data either by theme or chronology. These various ways of displaying data are optimized to help users locate, browse, and work together on records.

cards.title: In App Feedback
cards.description: The In App Feedback Framework consists of research, design, and implementation guidelines for hearing directly from users within the product.

cards.title: Layout
cards.description: A layout is a structural template that supports consistency across applications by defining visual grids, spacing, and sections.

cards.title: Loading
cards.description: Loading indicators help to reassure the user that the system is actively retrieving data.

cards.title: Localization
cards.description: Salesforce is committed to providing a high-quality experience to international customers.

cards.title: Markup and Style
cards.description: Naming conventions for consistent component development.

cards.title: Messaging UI
cards.description: Principles for real-time and asynchronous text-based customer conversations.

cards.title: Navigation
cards.description: Navigational patterns help users move between pages and situate themselves in the application.

cards.title: Notifications
cards.description: Notifications are messages that deliver information and insights to users, helping drive engagement and productivity.

cards.title: Prompt Design Guide
cards.description: Use this Prompt Design Guide to write templates and instructions that are clear, reusable, and built for impact.

cards.title: Rules, Filters, and Logic
cards.description: Build interactions that let users find the information they need, when they need it, and confidently take action (no matter how complex).

cards.title: Search
cards.description: Search is the most used feature in Salesforce, and users expect it to be fast, intelligent, and simple. With global search, users can get right to records and apps by entering simple keywords or using powerful advanced search features.

cards.title: User Engagement
cards.description: The Lightning User Engagement Framework consists of design guidelines for onboarding, adoption, assistance, and learning patterns across the Salesforce ecosystem.
